metadata.significance: Describes the final earthquake and emphasizes that all deeds will be weighed

ayahs.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ إِذَا زُلْزِلَتِ ٱلْأَرْضُ زِلْزَالَهَا

translations.en_sahih: When the earth is shaken with its [final] earthquake
translations.en_yusufali: When the earth is shaken to her (utmost) convulsion,
translations.ms_basmeih: Apabila bumi digegarkan dengan gegaran yang sedahsyat-dahsyatnya,

translations.en_sahih: And the earth discharges its burdens
translations.en_yusufali: And the earth throws up her burdens (from within),
translations.ms_basmeih: Serta bumi itu mengeluarkan segala isinya,

translations.en_sahih: And man says, "What is [wrong] with it?" -
translations.en_yusufali: And man cries (distressed): 'What is the matter with her?'-
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan berkatalah manusia (dengan perasaan gerun); "Apa yang sudah terjadi kepada bumi?"

translations.en_sahih: That Day, it will report its news
translations.en_yusufali: On that Day will she declare her tidings:
translations.ms_basmeih: Pada hari itu bumipun menceritakan khabar beritanya:

translations.en_sahih: Because your Lord has commanded it.
translations.en_yusufali: For that thy Lord will have given her inspiration.

ayahs.arabic: يَوْمَئِذٍ يَصْدُرُ ٱلنَّاسُ أَشْتَاتًا لِّيُرَوْا۟ أَعْمَـٰلَهُمْ
ayahs.transliteration: Yawmaithin yasduru alnnasu ashtatan liyuraw aAAmalahum

translations.en_sahih: That Day, the people will depart separated [into categories] to be shown [the result of] their deeds.
translations.en_yusufali: On that Day will men proceed in companies sorted out, to be shown the deeds that they (had done).
translations.ms_basmeih: Pada hari itu manusia akan keluar berselerak (dari kubur masing-masing) - untuk diperlihatkan kepada mereka (balasan) amal-amal mereka.

ayahs.arabic: فَمَن يَعْمَلْ مِثْقَالَ ذَرَّةٍ خَيْرًا يَرَهُۥ
ayahs.transliteration: Faman yaAAmal mithqala tharratin khayran yarahu

translations.en_sahih: So whoever does an atom's weight of good will see it,
translations.en_yusufali: Then shall anyone who has done an atom's weight of good, see it!
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka sesiapa berbuat kebajikan seberat zarah, nescaya akan dilihatnya (dalam surat amalnya)!

ayahs.arabic: وَمَن يَعْمَلْ مِثْقَالَ ذَرَّةٍ شَرًّا يَرَهُۥ
ayahs.transliteration: Waman yaAAmal mithqala tharratin sharran yarahu

translations.en_sahih: And whoever does an atom's weight of evil will see it.
translations.en_yusufali: And anyone who has done an atom's weight of evil, shall see it.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan sesiapa berbuat kejahatan seberat zarah, nescaya akan dilihatnya (dalam surat amalnya)!
